theme: Q3 is filling up — book your destination now

linkedin.text:
Honest update from our planning desk:

Q3 2026 is filling up fast.

Our most requested destinations — Barcelona, Athens, Amsterdam, Prague — are already 60% booked for July-September.

Here's what we're seeing:
→ Companies are booking 4-6 months earlier than pre-2024
→ Premium venues in peak season are going first
→ Groups over 50 need to secure flights NOW

If you're considering an incentive trip, team retreat, or corporate event for Q3 or Q4:

The best time to start planning was last month.
The second best time is today.

We still have availability for:
🇪🇸 Barcelona & Madrid
🇬🇷 Athens & Rhodes
🇵🇹 Lisbon & Porto
🇷🇸 Belgrade
🇭🇺 Budapest

📩 alon@upe.co.il | 🌐 upe.co.il

#CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #Q3Planning #EventPlanning #UproductionEvents #Europe #BusinessTravel #MICE
